message:
fix: policy YAML escaping and test timeout handling

- policy_cmd.go: handle missing automation section by returning empty
  string for regeneration; escape newlines/tabs in YAML double quotes
- contract_test.go: prevent timeout test from hanging forever with 5s
  hard deadline
- testdata/faketools: use exec in timeout mode so processes can be
  killed properly

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -7,7 +7,8 @@ MODE="${FAKE_TOOL_MODE:-normal}"
 
 case "$MODE" in
     timeout)
-        sleep 3600
+        # Use exec to replace bash with sleep so the process can be killed properly
+        exec sleep 3600
         ;;
     error)
         echo "am: simulated error" >&2

@@ -8,7 +8,9 @@ FIXTURES_DIR="$SCRIPT_DIR/../fixtures"
 
 case "$MODE" in
     timeout)
-        sleep 3600
+        # Use exec to replace bash with sleep so the process can be killed properly
+        # Without exec, sleep becomes a child process that survives when bash is killed
+        exec sleep 3600
         ;;
     error)
         echo "bv: simulated error" >&2
